title: Hadoop MapReduce Database Splitter Directory
description: The 'lib/db' directory houses classes for splitting database data in Hadoop MapReduce. It includes specialized splitters like BigDecimalSplitter, BooleanSplitter, DateSplitter, FloatSplitter, IntegerSplitter, and TextSplitter. Each class adapts Hadoop's InputSplit interface for specific database data types, illustrating the Adapter pattern. This ensures efficient parallel processing by transforming database values into suitable formats for Hadoop, splitting them, and converting back. Collaboration among these classes enables seamless integration of diverse database data types into Hadoop's MapReduce framework.
